$comment: Placeholder fixture for Phase 1.6 exemplar UC; replace with production-grade sample-data as part of Phase 4.5 sandbox validation.
description: Fixture exercising positive scenario for 22.43.1: When a CVE with CVSS ≥ 9.0 or marked exploited-in-the-wild is observed on a host for more than 30 days without a remediation record, the UC fires.
